baseline_false_convergences: Amyloid/tau evidence was weighted as a near-default explanatory spine before mixed-pathology and vascular-safety contradictions were fully separated.
Biomarker confidence was allowed to leak into etiologic confidence.
baseline_limitations: Baseline recognizes non-amyloid clusters but does not let them reorder the top bottleneck list.
leading_hypothesis: Amyloid/tau cascade with biomarker-defined AD biology and secondary modifiers.

pressure_tests.risk: Overreading amyloid removal as sufficient disease modification.
Treating biomarker-defined AD as equivalent to clinical etiology.
Treating vascular pathology as comorbidity rather than therapy-relevant contradiction.
Treating blood biomarker progress as purely settled rather than deployment-contested.
